description: Anna Tivel is a songwriter who is forever drawn to the quiet stories of ordinary life. Tivel has been likened to a short story writer and praised by NPR, Rolling Stone, Billboard, and others for her keen observations of the human condition. "Anna Tivel is just one of my absolute favourite living songwriters. Her writing on [Outsiders] is at the same level as Paul Simon when he wrote 'The Boxer' and 'American Tune.’” (Ann Power, NPR)
title: Anna Tivel Concert
